visual_description: A man with short hair in a dark leather jacket sits at a table, holding chopsticks and looking down at his food. He wears a watch on his left wrist and appears to be chewing while a blurred figure in a suit stands behind him. The scene is set in a dimly lit eatery with red decorations and steam rising from a nearby pot.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in Mandarin, asking a question, while ambient restaurant sounds are audible. The tone is conversational.
